title: Here's Why You Should Hold Equity Residential (EQR) Stock Now

title: Equity Residential stock rallies after Mizuho turns bullish, citing valuation and 2 near-term catalysts
text: Shares of Equity Residential EQR, +0.83% rose 0.9% in morning trading Tuesday, to outperform its real estate investment trust peers, after Mizuho analyst Haendel St. Juste turned bullish on the rental apartment REIT, citing an "intriguing risk/reward" following its recent underperformance. The gains come as the iShares Residential and Multisector Real Estate ETF REZ, -0.00 edged up just 0.1%.

title: Equity Residential Reports Big Increase in Earnings as Apartment Demand Remains Strong
text: Rents are rising as would-be homebuyers are squeezed out of the market.

title: Equity Residential Announces Death of Trustee Raymond Bennett
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Equity Residential (NYSE: EQR) is deeply saddened to announce the death of Raymond “Ray” Bennett, a member of the Company's Board of Trustees since 2018. Mr. Bennett, 53, was President, U.S. and Canada, Franchising and Managed by Marriott Select Brands for Marriott International, Inc. (NASDAQ: MAR). “All of us that were fortunate to know Ray Bennett mourn this tremendous loss. As a senior Marriott executive, he brought vast operational knowledge to Equity Residential b
